creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
Is the testing I was able to do sufficient for:

https://github.com/strejda/tegra/commit/4b51c967a61abc90aad5fd0f3083961e42562664
(A new one for ipv6 problem in exthdr test)

to progress towards being committed? (Would it get a review stage first?)

The same question for:

https://github.com/strejda/tegra/commit/bd4390c5f6a8b66b2fc83966d4fadb945a19dc23
(the original)


The "A new one for ipv6 problem in exthdr test" one in particular looks
like it would make a lot of testing of official snapshots easier/quicker
by eliminating panics, even if that just exposes non-panic issues. Being
able to run the kyua test cases to the end in one run would be handy for
anyone exploring armv7 via kyua. Eliminating panics is significant
progress of itself.
